known_upstream_deviations.paper_resolution: Paper mode must apply the strict selection gate to the slow-update candidate.

upstream_evidence.observation: max_analyst_rounds is loaded and logged but is not used to execute refinement rounds

known_upstream_deviations.paper_resolution: Paper mode must execute real semantic teacher refinement, capped at three rounds.

reuse_policy: Before copying any official source or prompt, append its repository-relative path and SHA256 to official_reference.reused_files. Upstream main is never a valid reference.
